name: labby
description: Skills and MCP configuration for the Lab homelab control plane.

server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: Base URL of the lab MCP HTTP server (labby serve). Default http://localhost:8765 for local access. Set to http://<hostname>:8765 when connecting from a remote machine or through a reverse proxy. Do NOT include a trailing /mcp — the plugin appends it.

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP authentication. Matches LAB_MCP_HTTP_TOKEN on the server. Required when auth_mode is bearer. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32 or just mcp-token in the lab Justfile.

auth_mode.title: Auth mode
auth_mode.description: Authentication mode the lab server is running. bearer: static token auth (default, requires api_token). oauth: Google OAuth via the lab auth server (requires public_url and Google OAuth credentials on the server). Maps to LAB_AUTH_MODE on the server.

public_url.title: Public URL
public_url.description: Public base URL of the lab server, e.g. https://lab.example.com. Required when auth_mode is oauth — used as the OAuth issuer and resource metadata base. Maps to LAB_PUBLIC_URL on the server.

mcp_gateway_url.title: MCP gateway URL
mcp_gateway_url.description: Separate public base URL for the MCP gateway when it runs on a different hostname from the lab UI, e.g. https://mcp.example.com. Leave empty when the app and gateway share a hostname (the common case). Maps to LAB_MCP_GATEWAY_URL on the server.

admin_enabled.title: Enable admin tools
admin_enabled.description: Enable the lab_admin MCP tool for operator-level administration. Requires the lab-admin feature gate compiled in. Maps to LAB_ADMIN_ENABLED=1 on the server.

log_filter.title: Log filter
log_filter.description: Tracing filter directive for labby serve, e.g. labby=debug,lab_apis=info. Maps to LAB_LOG on the server. Default keeps lab at info and SDK at warn to reduce noise.

log_format.title: Log format
log_format.description: Log output format for labby serve: text (human-readable with ANSI color when stderr is a TTY) or json (newline-delimited JSON for prod/CI). Maps to LAB_LOG_FORMAT on the server.

cors_origins.title: CORS origins
cors_origins.description: Additional CORS origins allowed for the lab API, comma-separated, e.g. https://lab.example.com,https://mcp.example.com. Loopback origins (localhost, 127.0.0.1, [::1]) are always included and do not need to be listed here. Maps to LAB_CORS_ORIGINS on the server.

google_client_id.title: Google OAuth client ID
google_client_id.description: Google OAuth Web Application client ID. Required when auth_mode is oauth. Create a Web application OAuth client in Google Cloud Console. Maps to LAB_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID on the server.

google_client_secret.title: Google OAuth client secret
google_client_secret.description: Google OAuth client secret. Required when auth_mode is oauth. Maps to LAB_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET on the server.

auth_admin_email.title: OAuth admin email
auth_admin_email.description: Bootstrap allowed Google account for OAuth mode. The server refuses to start OAuth without an allowlisted account. Maps to LAB_AUTH_ADMIN_EMAIL on the server.
